title: Mohawk Cat
content: The very first cat in the game, available to every player at the start,іt can also drop from a Normal Cat Capsule.True Form was added in version 2.0, doubling its attack power.

title: Eraser Cat
content: As the second Normal unit available, this defender joins your army once you beat the Korea in EoC 1. Purchasing it requires 0 XP, and it can also drop from a Normal Cat Capsule. Reaching its True Form in Update 2.0 grants significant boosts to both its HP and offensive stats.

title: Dark Cat
content: This melee unit is the third Normal cat you get, unlocking after beating China in EoC 1. It costs 0 XP to buy and can also be obtained from a Normal Cat Capsule. Getting its True Form in Version 1.0 increases its health and attack power.
